name: github-signal-actor
title: GitHub Organization Signal Parser
description: Detects engineering team growth via new repos, stack changes, and external contributors

input.title: Input
input.description: GitHub org handles and authentication settings.

githubOrgs.title: GitHub organizations
githubOrgs.description: List of GitHub org names to monitor.

githubToken.title: GitHub token
githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token for authenticated API requests.

lookbackDays.title: Days to look back
lookbackDays.description: Only include GitHub activity observed within this many days.
